message: wizard: reduce auth confusion + avoid Apple glyph

files.patch:
@@ -244,7 +244,7 @@ export default function OSSelectionPage() {
  • Mac: Look at the top-left corner of your screen. Do you - see an Apple icon ()? Click it and select "About This Mac" and + see the Apple menu (top-left Apple logo)? Click it and select "About This Mac" and it will say something like "macOS Sonoma" or "macOS Ventura".

@@ -171,7 +171,7 @@ export default function StatusCheckPage() {

Authenticate your services

- Log in to each tool to connect your accounts + Log in to the tools you plan to use now (you can do the rest later)

@@ -203,9 +203,9 @@ export default function StatusCheckPage() { the rest later.

    -
  • Recommended now: Claude Code
    • +
  • Recommended now: Claude Code (so you can start coding immediately)
  • Optional now: Codex, Gemini (only if you plan to use them)
    • -
  • Later: Cloud tools (Wrangler / Supabase / Vercel), GitHub CLI, etc.
    • +
  • Optional later: Cloud tools (Wrangler / Supabase / Vercel) and anything else you don't need yet

If you skip a login, the tool is still installed — it just won't work until you authenticate.
